source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/03_ADD (HAD1717MCW)/▶ FDA/1차 완료/05. Software_Validation/임포유_콘솔_문서/Console Software Validation Report_Rev.1_KOR_2.1.255.60.docx

document.title: Software Validation Console Report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Software validation report for feel-DRCS version 2.1.255.60 used with ADD digital flat panel X-ray detector products.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory and quality-system evidence for software lifecycle planning, requirements, design, verification, validation, risk management, cybersecurity, configuration management, and release of the console software.
keyPoints: feelDRCS is digital X-ray operating console software supporting DICOM 3.0, image acquisition from X-ray detectors, PACS transfer, and film printing.
The report identifies connected hardware including HAD1717MG, HAD1717MC, ADD(HAD1417MCW), and ADD(HAD1717MCW) detectors.
The software safety classification is B grade.
Software development and management are performed under EN ISO 13485:2016, with ISO 14971:2007 applied across the software lifecycle.
Unit, integration, system, regression, and security tests for version 2.1.255.60 are recorded as Pass.

evidence.claim: The document is a software validation console report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Software Validation Console Report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The report number and revision are A-TCF-5-072 Rev.2.
The software name is feel-DRCS and the version is 2.1.255.60.
The connected hardware includes HAD1717MG, HAD1717MC, ADD(HAD1417MCW), and ADD(HAD1717MCW) detectors.
evidence.evidenceText: 연결 하드웨어 : HAD1717MG, HAD1717MC, ADD(HAD1417MCW), ADD(HAD1717MCW) 검출기

evidence.claim: The software supports DICOM 3.0 and transfers images to PACS or outputs film through a medical film printer.
evidence.evidenceText: 의료영상의 국제표준인 DICOM 3.0을 지원하며, 고해상도의 영상을 X선 검출기로부터 획득하여 최적을 영상을 만든 후 PACS 네트워크를 통해 PACS 서버로 영상을 전송하거나, 의료용 필름 프린터장치로 필름을 출력하는 소프트웨어이다.

evidence.claim: The applied software standards include ISO 62304:2006+AMD1:2015 and ISO 14971:2007.
Software development and management are conducted under EN ISO 13485:2016.
evidence.evidenceText: 당사의 품질 경영 시스템인 EN ISO 13485:2016 에 의하여 소프트웨어 개발 및 관리를 실시한다.

evidence.claim: ISO 14971:2007 is applied throughout the software development lifecycle.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 소프트웨어 개발생명주기 전반에 걸쳐서 ISO 14971:2007을 적용한다.

evidence.claim: The software safety classification is B grade.
The development period for the update was 2021.05.04 to 2021.05.26.
The development process methodology is waterfall.
The software development tools include MS Visual Studio 2005, .NET Framework 3.5 SP1 or later, and Leadtools PACS Imaging SDK 16.5 or 17.
evidence.evidenceText:
MS Visual C++ MS Visual Studio 2005

.NET Framework .NET Framework 3.5 SP1 or later

DICOM Library Leadtools PACS Imaging SDK 16.5 or 17

evidence.claim: The OS and SOUP environment requirements include Windows 7 Pro SP1 32/64 or later, MS Access 2002 or later, and Leadtools PACS Imaging Ver 16.5.
evidence.evidenceText:
OS Windows 7 Pro Sp1 32/64 이상

DB MS Access 2002 이상

DICOM Library Leadtools PACS Imaging Ver 16.5

evidence.claim: PEMS is defined for X-ray detector connection and DICOM network functions communicating with the hospital information network.
evidence.evidenceText: X선 검출기의 연결 및 병원정보망과 통신하는 DICOM Network 관련된 기능들에 대하여 PEMS로 정의한다.

evidence.claim: The software release section states that functional verification was acceptable, regression verification was completed, and residual risk was not found based on the Risk Management Report.
evidence.evidenceText:
위의 2.5 ~ 2.7 까지의 시험에서 소프트웨어 기능 및 검증이 이상 없음을 확인하였다.

또한 회귀시험으로 모든 항목들에 대한 검증도 완료된 것으로 확인되었다.

그리고 Risk Management Report 기준에서도 잔여 위험이 없는 것으로 확인하였다.

evidence.claim: The cybersecurity safety grade is medium and the communication technology is wired LAN.
evidence.evidenceText:
1) 사이버 보안 안정성 등급 : 중

2) 사용되는 통신 기술 : 유선LAN

evidence.claim: The device does not use a public network.
The unit test, integration test, system test, and security test appendices record Pass results for version 2.1.255.60.
Version 2.1.255.60 added the H&abyz ADD(HAD1717MCW) detector.
evidence.evidenceText:
2.1.255.60

Add Function

Add H&abyz ADD(HAD1717MCW) detector

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal FDA is provided in metadata/source path, but the source text body does not explicitly state FDA jurisdiction or FDA submission status.
Source path filename contains Rev.1, while document body states Report No.: A-TCF-5-072 (Rev.2).
Document date is inferred from approval date MAY/28/2021 because no separate document effective date is stated.
Some table extraction text contains OCR or conversion errors such as misspellings, duplicated identifiers, and garbled checkbox symbols.
